title: Parser de Ações Detalhadas por Street
plan: Extend database schema in src/db/schema.py: add board_flop, board_turn, board_river columns to hands table
Create ActionData dataclass in src/parsers/base.py with fields: hand_id, street, player, action_type, amount, is_hero, sequence_order, position

Implement GGPoker action parser in src/parsers/ggpoker.py: parse_actions() method using street-based state machine (*** HOLE CARDS ***, *** FLOP ***, etc.), extract fold/call/raise/check/bet/all-in with amounts, handle edge cases (uncalled bets, 'and is all-in')
Implement board card detection for GGPoker: parse *** FLOP *** [cards], *** TURN ***, *** RIVER *** lines
Implement position mapping logic for 6-max and 8-max tables: calculate BTN/SB/BB/UTG/MP/CO from button seat indicator
Implement PokerStars action parser in src/parsers/pokerstars.py: same action parsing adapted for PS format differences (no $ prefix on amounts, ante posting, different player name formats)
Implement board card detection for PokerStars (bracket format: [6s 2c Ts])
Add VPIP detection: flag voluntary pot entry (call/raise preflop excluding forced blinds/antes)
Add repository methods in src/db/repository.py: insert_actions_batch(), update_hand_board()
Integrate action parsing into import pipeline in src/importer.py: after hand parsing, extract actions and board cards, persist to hand_actions table
Add comprehensive unit tests in tests/test_parsers.py: action parsing per street, board detection, position mapping, all-in handling, VPIP detection, both GGPoker and PokerStars formats
Validate with real hand history data from data/ folder and fix edge cases
